# StepUpActor enumeration

Who the client is acting for, governing whether a step-up flow is attempted (spec §23.18, R-23.18-m, R-23.18-n).

```csharp
public enum StepUpActor
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| User | `0` | Acting on behalf of a user; SHOULD attempt step-up (R-23.18-m). |
| ClientCredentials | `1` | Acting on its own behalf; MAY attempt or abort (R-23.18-n). |
